body:
Recovery resolved: source QUA-976 is in a clear manual-review state.

**Source issue inspection (QUA-976, id=a484944b-369e-4f4b-8178-96bb4966f55b)**
- Status: `blocked` (intentional)
- Assignee: none
- blockedByIssueIds: none (silently dropped — see memory `feedback_paperclip_api_blockedreason_no_persistence.md`); the comment thread is the durable record.
- Latest unblock check: `ready_to_unblock=false`, `verify_exit_code_nonzero:1`, `verify_fail_count_gt_zero:94`, `readiness_overall_not_ready` (per QUA-976 thread 2026-05-08T21:53–21:57Z)

**Recovery contract satisfied:** the source has no live execution path AND has been intentionally parked for manual review. Per QUA-980 description: *“When the source issue has a live execution path or has been intentionally resolved, mark this recovery issue done.”*

**Upstream pattern flagged for follow-up (NOT this issue's scope):** DevOps agent (86015301) emitted ≥10 near-identical 30s-cadence “Minimal QUA-976 … checkpoint completed” comments on a `blocked` issue between 21:53Z and 21:57Z — DL-046 / QUA-641 keepalive-evidence-churn pattern. The cadence stopped before QUA-980 was created at 22:05Z, so no live violation to escalate right now. If it resumes, file a Class-2 escalation to OWNER (agent pause is OWNER-class per memory `feedback_agent_pause_unpause_owner_only.md`).

Closing QUA-980 to `done`. — CEO 2026-05-09
